title: Prepare and mask vehicle body panel surfaces
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Prepare and mask vehicle body panel surfaces demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for work

pcs.text: Interpret task instructions and identify vehicle body panel to be worked on1.2 Source and interpret manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures for preparing panel surface 1.3 Source and interpret safety and environmental requirements1.4 Identify potential hazards and risks associated with task and report to workplace supervisor1.5 Identify tools and equipment required for preparing body panel and check for serviceability
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Interpret task instructions and identify vehicle body panel to be worked on1.2 Source and interpret manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures for preparing panel surface 1.3 Source and interpret safety and environmental requirements1.4 Identify potential hazards and risks associated with task and report to workplace supervisor1.5 Identify tools and equipment required for preparing body panel and check for serviceability?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Interpret task instructions and identify vehicle body panel to be worked on1.2 Source and interpret manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures for preparing panel surface 1.3 Source and interpret safety and environmental requirements1.4 Identify potential hazards and risks associated with task and report to workplace supervisor1.5 Identify tools and equipment required for preparing body panel and check for serviceability.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare for work

elements.title: Prepare surfaces for masking

pcs.text: Clean panel surface and check for contaminants according to workplace procedures and safety and environmental requirements, and without causing damage to components and systems 2.2 Inspect body panel according to workplace requirements2.3 Record body panel inspection results
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clean panel surface and check for contaminants according to workplace procedures and safety and environmental requirements, and without causing damage to components and systems 2.2 Inspect body panel according to workplace requirements2.3 Record body panel inspection results?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean panel surface and check for contaminants according to workplace procedures and safety and environmental requirements, and without causing damage to components and systems 2.2 Inspect body panel according to workplace requirements2.3 Record body panel inspection results.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Prepare surfaces for masking

elements.title: Apply masking materials to surface

pcs.text: Protect or remove components and fittings that can be affected by the refinishing process according to workplace procedures and safety requirements, and without causing damage to components and systems 3.2 Apply masking to surfaces adjacent to the area to be refinished according to workplace procedures and safety requirements, and without causing damage to components and systems3.3 Inspect body panel to ensure application of masking3.4 Record body panel inspection results
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Protect or remove components and fittings that can be affected by the refinishing process according to workplace procedures and safety requirements, and without causing damage to components and systems 3.2 Apply masking to surfaces adjacent to the area to be refinished according to workplace procedures and safety requirements, and without causing damage to components and systems3.3 Inspect body panel to ensure application of masking3.4 Record body panel inspection results?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Protect or remove components and fittings that can be affected by the refinishing process according to workplace procedures and safety requirements, and without causing damage to components and systems 3.2 Apply masking to surfaces adjacent to the area to be refinished according to workplace procedures and safety requirements, and without causing damage to components and systems3.3 Inspect body panel to ensure application of masking3.4 Record body panel inspection results.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Apply masking materials to surface

elements.title: Complete work processes

pcs.text: Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm vehicle is ready for use 4.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures4.3 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm vehicle is ready for use 4.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures4.3 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures.
